description: Originally designed for boaters and fishermen to have a firm foot even on slippery surfaces, crocs has gone a  long way in creating footwear for those who demand comfort to the T. Replete with several benefits such as the shoe moulding to your feet with just the body warmth, it's a hot favourite among most people. The midsole band found in all of crocs footwear is a tribute to the classic vulcanized style of yesteryear footwear.Increadibly easy to clean, Crocs makes for a great footwear when working in the garden or in wet and messy conditions.  The speciality of these shoes are that they need to Fit loosely around the feet, such that neither the sides of the shoe nor the toe unit come in contact with the feet. Instead, there should be a quarter to half inch gap between the foot and the wall of the shoe, and you should be able to comfortably fit a finger between the heel and back strap. Upper EVA upper with textured inside for lightweight feel, comfort and durability EVA material that moulds to the foot shape offering ample ergonomic comfort Perforations on the forefoot for ventilation, drain away water and to add jibbitz Back strap to support the ankle and hold the foot in place Upper moulded to midsole for comfort and protection of feet from abrasion Broad EVA lining along the midsole for enhanced durability Branding button on upper for style Midsole EVA footbed horizontal and foot shape lines for ergonomic comfort and acupressure Crocs branding on mid heel for comfort and style Fungus, bacteria and odour resistant for a healthy wear even in wet conditions Mild heel cup on the footbed to support the heel Outsole Slip resistant outsole for Multi-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and backfoot for ample grip, stability and comfort Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash Note: Jibbitz is a company founded by Rich and Sheri Schmeltzer in 2005 to create decorative attachments for the holes in Crocs sandals.
